latest.notes:
- feat(llm-auth): Models tab restructured — first "預設模型" tab shows TRUE global config (was leaking main agent's override view), then one tab per agent for per-agent overrides at `agents.list[].model`.
- Per-agent editor: pick primary model or inherit global; optionally override fallbacks with reorderable list; "Save" auto-dispatches clear when both fields set to inherit.
- Snappier UX: optimistic cache patches on set-default / fallbacks add/remove/reorder / agent override so badge + highlight track the spinner instead of waiting on the ~3s openclaw refetch.
- Loader2 spinner + "saving" copy on model-card buttons, override editor buttons, and fallbacks section header during reorder.
- Native \<select\> popups forced to dark color-scheme + per-option bg for Firefox / older Chrome (no more white-on-white dropdowns on light system themes).
